title: Add score-10 easter egg milestone overlay

requirements.summary: Add a one-shot score-10 easter egg with street-art overlay matching the existing score-5 and score-15 milestone style
acceptanceCriteria: When the player reaches score 10 for the first time in a game session, a street-art-style overlay appears.
The easter egg fires only once per game session, not on subsequent score-10 occurrences.
The overlay visual style matches the existing score-5 and score-15 easter eggs.
Game slows down momentarily when the easter egg triggers, matching existing behavior.
No files listed in frontend.immutablePaths are modified.

file_operations.description: Add score10EasterEgg state flag, initialize it to false in resetGame, and add a one-shot trigger when score reaches 10 that sets the flag to true and applies the same slowdown effect (gameSpeed *= 0.3) used by score-5 and score-15 easter eggs.

Add a new conditional street-art overlay section that displays when score10EasterEgg is true, using the same visual structure, Tailwind classes, and typography styles as the existing score-5 and score-15 easter egg overlays.
